content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No defects were found in the reviewed change set. The working-tree diff only updates .ralph-burning project metadata, and `src/adapters/process_backend.rs` + `src/adapters/tmux.rs` currently already pass bounded stdout text into `classify_exit_failure_with_output` when structured stdout parsing is unavailable, with corresponding tests for plain-stdout-only exhaustion classification.

## Amendments

None.
